'''âp-ch-n''' ('''shapachan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nappy|nappy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nappy|nappy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-ch-n
|-
! Lemma
| shapachan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipachan|thipachan]] || [[word:jipachan|jipachan]] || [[word:shipachan|shipachan]] || [[word:kipachan|kipachan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupachan|thuthupachan]] || [[word:jujupachan|jujupachan]] || [[word:shushupachan|shushupachan]] || [[word:kukupachan|kukupachan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupachan|thupachan]] || [[word:jupachan|jupachan]] || [[word:shupachan|shupachan]] || [[word:kupachan|kupachan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupachan|thupachan]] || [[word:jupachan|jupachan]] || [[word:shupachan|shupachan]] || [[word:kupachan|kupachan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepachan|thepachan]] || [[word:jepachan|jepachan]] || [[word:shepachan|shepachan]] || [[word:kepachan|kepachan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopachan|thothopachan]] || [[word:jojopachan|jojopachan]] || [[word:shoshopachan|shoshopachan]] || [[word:kokopachan|kokopachan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopachan|thopachan]] || [[word:jopachan|jopachan]] || [[word:shopachan|shopachan]] || [[word:kopachan|kopachan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopachan|thopachan]] || [[word:jopachan|jopachan]] || [[word:shopachan|shopachan]] || [[word:kopachan|kopachan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpachan|thĂŠpachan]] || [[word:jĂŠpachan|jĂŠpachan]] || [[word:shĂŠpachan|shĂŠpachan]] || [[word:kĂŠpachan|kĂŠpachan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapachan|thathapachan]] || [[word:jajapachan|jajapachan]] || [[word:shashapachan|shashapachan]] || [[word:kakapachan|kakapachan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapachan|thapachan]] || [[word:japachan|japachan]] || [[word:shapachan|shapachan]] || [[word:kapachan|kapachan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapachan|thapachan]] || [[word:japachan|japachan]] || [[word:shapachan|shapachan]] || [[word:kapachan|kapachan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapachan|shapachan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapachan|goshapachan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapachan|gokishapachan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapachanĂŒ|shapachanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapachanknĂŒ|goshapachanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapachanĂŒ|gokishapachanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapachanshĂ«|shapachanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapachankshĂ«|goshapachankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapachanshĂ«|gokishapachanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapachanro|shapachanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapachankro|goshapachankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapachanro|gokishapachanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapachanmu|shapachanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapachankmu|goshapachankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapachanmu|gokishapachanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapachansher|shapachansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapachanksher|goshapachanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapachansher|gokishapachansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapachang|shapachang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapachankng|goshapachankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapachang|gokishapachang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapachanya|shapachanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapachankya|goshapachankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapachanya|gokishapachanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapachanyam|shapachanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapachankyam|goshapachankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapachanyam|gokishapachanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapachanĂŒshĂ«|shapachanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapachanknĂŒshĂ«|goshapachanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapachanĂŒshĂ«|gokishapachanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapachanĂŒro|shapachanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapachanknĂŒro|goshapachanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapachanĂŒro|gokishapachanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapachanĂŒmu|shapachanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapachanknĂŒmu|goshapachanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapachanĂŒmu|gokishapachanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapachanshĂ«nĂŒ|shapachanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapachankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapachankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapachanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapachanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapachanshĂ«ro|shapachanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapachankshĂ«ro|goshapachankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapachanshĂ«ro|gokishapachanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapachanshĂ«mu|shapachanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapachankshĂ«mu|goshapachankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapachanshĂ«mu|gokishapachanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapachanronĂŒ|shapachanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapachankronĂŒ|goshapachankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapachanronĂŒ|gokishapachanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapachanroshĂ«|shapachanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapachankroshĂ«|goshapachankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapachanroshĂ«|gokishapachanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapachanromu|shapachanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapachankromu|goshapachankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapachanromu|gokishapachanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapachanmunĂŒ|shapachanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapachankmunĂŒ|goshapachankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapachanmunĂŒ|gokishapachanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapachanmushĂ«|shapachanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapachankmushĂ«|goshapachankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapachanmushĂ«|gokishapachanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapachanmuro|shapachanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapachankmuro|goshapachankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapachanmuro|gokishapachanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
